title: rulac interior
intro: Rulac interior, also known as the Rulaca or Rulaca Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rulac interior include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as acting as an antidote for snake bites and other poisonous substances. Herbal preparations of Rulac interior, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
